findings.description: The interface name `Validatable` is used in s1 section content ("3. `Validatable` 実装クラスまたはMap") but is absent from s1's hints array. Per V4 rules, PascalCase class/interface names appearing in the section content must be included in hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source: "入力値を保持した Validatable インタフェースを実装したクラス、または Map" (ValidationUtil.validateAndConvertRequest 第3引数の説明)
